style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. In the centre, a simple schematic person token stands on a clear, open path. To the left, a stack of three labelled blocks reading TECHNICAL DEBT, CASE BACKLOGS, and RED TAPE is being lifted and carried out of the way by a small robot-and-gear motif labelled AI, clearing the path ahead of the person. Above the scene, a heading reads HUMAN-CENTERED AI. A small caption below reads THE TOOLS CLEAR THE BARRIERS; THE PEOPLE DO THE WORK. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no real people beyond a simple schematic token.
composed_prompt:
